Welcome to Emerald Charm

An estate where architecture, light and privacy meet.

Tucked into the rolling estate country of Loudoun, Emerald Charm Villa is a thoughtfully designed private retreat — five thousand square feet of light-filled great rooms, a resort-style pool, two bars, a curated entertainment level, and the kind of quiet that only comes from gated grounds. It is, simply, a place to gather without compromise.

The Spaces

Seven distinct rooms.
One uncompromising standard.

01 — The Arrival

A staircase that becomes the centerpiece.

Hand-curved with backlit onyx treads and an unbroken brass handrail, the staircase is the first moment of the home — and the most photographed. Guests pause. It does what it was designed to do.

  • Backlit onyx-veined stone treads
  • Solid brass curved handrail
  • Glass balustrade with custom hardware
02 — The Great Room

Ceiling-mounted theatre. Programmable light.

Double-height coffered ceilings frame a forty-foot great room with floor-to-ceiling sliders to the pool deck. Programmable LED coves shift the mood from morning meeting to evening reception with a single touch.

  • Custom brass tiered chandelier
  • Linear gas fireplace with built-in shelving
  • RGB programmable cove lighting
  • Double-slider access to pool terrace
03 — The Entertainment Level

For the long evenings.

Regulation pool table, full second bar, lounge seating, mezzanine views and the same chandeliered ceilings as the main level. Designed for the part of the night when guests stop checking their watches.

  • Tournament-grade pool table
  • Marble-clad basement bar
  • Open mezzanine connection
04 — The Pool Terrace

Resort scale. Estate privacy.

A full-perimeter wrought iron fence, mature tree line and gated grounds mean the terrace stays yours. The pool itself reads more resort than residence — built for swimmers, sunbathers, and the kind of summer afternoons that turn into evenings.

  • Resort-scale pool with full deck
  • Gated, fully fenced private grounds
  • Mature tree-line privacy buffer

Transparent. Direct. Without intermediary.

Event guests (beyond 10) hosted at $50–$75 per person · Bespoke packages available

Private Events

Forty to fifty.
In a home — not a venue.

From small weddings and milestone birthdays to executive offsites and seasonal corporate gatherings — Emerald Charm Villa hosts events with the proportion of a venue and the intimacy of a private home.

Plan Your Event
W

Weddings & Receptions

Ceremony on the pool terrace. Reception in the great room. Photographs on the staircase.

C

Corporate Retreats

Off-site strategy sessions, executive team gatherings, founder retreats with overnight accommodations.

B

Milestone Birthdays

Significant birthdays, anniversaries and family celebrations. A full property, no curfew on the smile lines.

G

Graduations & Family

Multi-generational gatherings, graduation weekends, holiday extensions. The estate becomes the destination.
